channel.title: Society Linux Updates
channel.description: Latest changelogs, SLR package drops, and development notes for Society Linux.

item.title: SLR Core Command Update
item.description: Added the syntax for installing system packages using: sudo ./societylinux.sh --syspack {package_name}

item.title: Society Linux Project Launch
item.description: Official announcement of the Society Linux shell environment beta and the SLR repository layout.
